input: Imagine a self-contained, hypothetical world with only the following conditions, and without any unmentioned factors or causal relationships: Jyka has a direct effect on yupt and kwox. Yupt has a direct effect on kwox. Method 1: We look at how jyka correlates with kwox case by case according to yupt. Method 2: We look directly at how jyka correlates with kwox in general. To understand how jyka affects kwox, is it more correct to use the Method 1 than Method 2?
